hero.title: Build Smarter Digital Systems.
hero.description: Digital Blueprint Lab helps creators, freelancers, and digital builders develop practical systems, AI workflows, and modern digital products.

about.title: Inside The Lab
about.description1: Digital Blueprint Lab is a modern digital lab focused on practical execution, freelancing systems, AI-assisted workflows, and digital product building.
about.description2: We believe success online is built through systems, execution, and clarity - not fake hype or unrealistic promises.

product.title: The Digital Blueprint Guide
product.subtitle: Systems. AI. Freelance execution.
product.description: A practical operating guide for creators and freelancers who want cleaner execution, sharper client communication, and better digital systems.

simulation.title: Client Simulation Lab
simulation.description: Train your communication with client simulations that model negotiation, revision requests, expectation-setting, pricing friction, and delivery updates.
simulation.clientMessage: Can you do the full launch page by Friday and keep it inside the original scope?
simulation.builderMessage: I can meet Friday for the core page. The extra launch assets would be a phase two add-on.

systems.title: Digital Systems
systems.subtitle: Blueprints for modern execution.
systems.aiDescription: Prompt chains, automation maps, and repeatable delivery systems.
systems.fsDescription: Offer clarity, client onboarding, scope control, and execution loops.
systems.tpDescription: Reusable assets for proposals, briefs, product maps, and delivery.
systems.dtDescription: Lean tool stacks built for speed, clarity, and measurable output.
systems.pbDescription: Execution frameworks for staying focused from idea to launch.

cta.title: Start Building Your Digital Blueprint Today.
